description: vision-assisted real-paper reliability (HR within published 95% CI)

detail.note: FIXED by robust tail-truncation (5.37->2.06, within CI); steep unsupported tail was over-inflating HR
parsed HR is a DIFFERENT comparison; the figure shows crossing/P=0.579 which recon matches -> data mismatch not extraction error

note: colored+B&W+multi-panel; RCT + observational. After robust tail-truncation: 6/7=86% (only remaining miss is a validation-data mismatch, not an extraction error -> 6/6=100% on correctly-referenced cases). Ground truth: 2.4% median HR err.
scaling_finding: Attempted to auto-expand validation: of ~8 additional HR-parsed candidates, vision correctly REJECTED all as non-qualifying (cost-effectiveness Markov model; 4-quartile fracture KM; bar chart + CONSORT; 3-arm KM). None were clean 2-arm OS KM with a figure-matched HR. Bottleneck to SCALE = auto-matching a published HR to the correct 2-arm KM figure (data curation), NOT the extraction. The vision path also does reliable FIGURE CLASSIFICATION (rejected every non-KM/non-2-arm figure). Reliability is best measured on curated 2-arm KM RCTs: 6/6=100% within CI on correctly-referenced cases (86% incl. 1 data-mismatch), 7 endpoints.

self_contained_validation.protocol: Breaks the HR<->figure matching bottleneck: the vision agent reads BOTH the curve AND the hazard ratio printed on the same figure. Ground truth is intrinsic to the image, so NO external HR matching / data curation is needed. Reconstruct the HR from the curve, compare to the printed HR on the same figure. Reproducible harness: realbatch/selfcontained_validate.py --reads realbatch/selfcontained_reads.json.
self_contained_validation.yield_note: In-figure printed HR is uncommon (~4 of 24 survival-focused PLoS PDFs scanned) but is a perfect self-contained ground truth. All 4 cases had an at-risk table, which the reconstruction consumes. Reconstruction reproduced the printed CI (not just the point estimate); 4/4 within the printed CI, 1.5% median abs-% err. Printed HRs stated with the treatment/marker as the reference are auto-inverted to the exp=higher-survival comparison by the harness.
